commands.review_summary:
The PR moves Control UI exec/plugin approval prompt cleanup into controller helpers, clears stale externally resolved prompts, adds neutral Dismiss/reopen behavior, and expands focused UI/controller/gateway tests.

PR surface: Source +247, Tests +372. Total +619 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source, not live-reproduced here. Current main removes resolved approvals from the queue without clearing active modal error state, and the decision handler turns stale resolve errors into visible modal errors.
commands.review_followup: No narrow automated repair target was found; maintainer review should decide the compatibility/UX risk and wait for the remaining CI check.

target.title: Fix stale approval prompts in Control UI
target.body:
Summary:
- Fix stale Control UI approval prompts when an exec or plugin approval is resolved from another client, such as Discord, Slack, CLI, or another Web UI.
- Treat stale resolve responses as terminal UI cleanup signals: `APPROVAL_ALREADY_RESOLVED`, `APPROVAL_NOT_FOUND`, and `unknown or expired approval id` now dismiss the prompt and refresh pending approvals.
- Add a neutral Dismiss/close path that hides the modal without denying or approving the backend approval, plus a visible pending-approval reopen button so live approvals are not stranded.

Bug summary:
A web approval modal could remain open after the same approval was resolved elsewhere. Acting on that stale modal could leave the prompt showing an error instead of dismissing it. The modal also needed a local close path so the user is not trapped in the approval dialog.

Root cause:
On main, `exec.approval.resolved` only removed the queue item and did not clear active modal error state. The approve/deny handler also treated all resolve errors as modal errors, so backend stale-approval responses stayed visible instead of clearing the stale prompt. The modal cancel path was wired to denial, so closing was not a neutral UI action.

Fix summary:
The approval controller now owns resolve and modal visibility cleanup. Success removes the active prompt. Stale backend errors remove it, refresh `exec.approval.list` and `plugin.approval.list`, and schedule expiry cleanup for refreshed items. A dismissed-id set lets users close the modal locally while keeping the backend approval pending. If a live approval is dismissed, the UI renders a small pending-approval button that reopens the modal.

Bug existed on main:
Yes. The worktree started from `origin/main` and the added regression failed before the fix. The rebased parent still had the same behavior: `removeResolvedApprovalRequest` only removed from `execApprovalQueue`, and `handleExecApprovalDecision` caught every resolve error as `execApprovalError`.

Verification:
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=.artifacts/vitest-cache-approval-modal node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.browser.test.ts --run` passed, 4 files / 88 tests.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs ui/src/styles/components.css ui/src/ui/app-gateway-chat-load.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.sessions.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts ui/src/ui/app-view-state.ts ui/src/ui/app.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.browser.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.ts` passed.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo` passed.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.ui.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-ui.tsbuildinfo` passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 ui/src/styles/components.css ui/src/ui/app-gateway-chat-load.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.sessions.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts ui/src/ui/app-view-state.ts ui/src/ui/app.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.browser.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.ts` passed.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` passed: no accepted/actionable findings.

Behavior addressed: stale Control UI exec/plugin approval modals after external resolution, neutral modal dismissal without resolving the backend approval, and a visible reopen path for dismissed live approvals.
Real environment tested: local Vitest, oxlint, tsgo, oxfmt, and autoreview in the OpenClaw worktree; earlier local manual Gateway with Discord + Control UI confirmed an externally resolved approval dismissed from the web UI.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: triggered approval handling through the focused UI/controller/gateway tests listed above; earlier manual flow triggered an approval, opened the web UI modal, resolved through Discord, and observed the web UI modal close.
Evidence after fix: focused tests passed; resolved events and stale backend errors remove prompts and refresh pending approvals; view tests confirm Escape/Dismiss stay usable and dismissed live approvals can be reopened.
Observed result after fix: stale resolve success/errors remove the modal, external resolved events clear active prompt errors, refreshed pending approvals expire from the UI, and Dismiss/Escape close the modal without sending a deny while leaving a visible pending-approval reopen control.
What was not tested: a fresh live Slack-to-Control-UI stale approval flow after the final clean branch rewrite.
